Other Feedback/Suggestions/Discoveries? You can reach out to me on Discord: prototyze AVG%
column17:
TL = Tech Level | r-Index = Quality of Invention, based on Quantity of Components used & their Rarity (Common-Legendary)
The lower an r-Index with same Invention Tech % is at a specific Tech Level, the better (fewer resources used for Invention)
